title: Project Lumina — Universal Prompt Contract Schema
description: Base schema that all Project Lumina prompt contracts must conform to. Domain packs extend this schema with domain-specific fields (e.g., hint_level, skills_targeted). A domain-specific prompt-contract-schema.json that adds required fields and constrains prompt_type to a domain-defined enum is a valid extension of this base.

prompt_type.description: The type of prompt being issued. Valid values are defined by the active domain pack.

domain_pack_id.description: Globally unique identifier of the domain pack that produced this contract (format: domain/{org}/{name}/v{major})

domain_pack_version.description: Semver version of the domain pack active when this prompt was generated

task_id.description: Identifier for the current task within the domain

references.description: Retrieved artifacts cited in this prompt (grounding contract). Domain packs may require this field.

grounded.description: Whether all claims in this prompt are grounded in cited artifacts

theme.description: World simulation theme applied to this prompt (immersion only — must not influence domain content or difficulty)
